ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income group of the country */,
  "gdp_percapita" REAL /* GDP per capita in USD */,
  "gross_savings" REAL /* Gross savings as a percentage of GDP */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate as a percentage */,
  "total_investment" REAL /* Total investment as a percentage of GDP */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "exports" REAL /* Value of exports in USD */,
  "imports" REAL /* Value of imports in USD */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "data_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_income_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_group_id") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs (e.g., Asia, Africa) */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region (e.g., South Asia, Eastern Africa) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "income_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the income group (e.g., Low income, Upper middle income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the income group in USD */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the income group in USD */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income group data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income group data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_econ_id FOREIGN KEY ("econ_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was last updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_econ_id FOREIGN KEY ("econ_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("econ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_econ_id FOREIGN KEY ("econ_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("econ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry used in the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_econ_id FOREIGN KEY ("econ_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("econ_id")
)
